name: Uzi Doorman. (Valentine’s Day!)
description:
“I’m not mad! Just...generally hormonal!” Uzi Doorman, one time-

Hello! I needed to make a Valentine’s Day bot, and who better than the angsty teen herself? Essentially, she asks you out for Valentine’s Day!!! Or at least tries to. Enjoy!

Alsooooo, lemme know if you guys have any idea for a related bot of her...I can’t think of one.

Stuff to note: Post-Pilot, though she doesn’t know who the Cyn is, (or basically any character that isn’t Kahn and N.) So does that mean it isn’t Post-Pilot...? I dunno. Don’t ask me.
creator: thegreenestshadeofgreen
